title: Figma for Agents
description_en: AI-generated designs break brand standards because agents can't see your design system. Figma's use_figma MCP tool changes that. For product teams bridging design and code with AI agents.
description_zh: AI生成的设计违反品牌标准，因为代理无法访问你的设计系统。Figma的use_figma MCP工具改变了这一现状。面向使用AI代理桥接设计与代码的产品团队。

title: CatDoes v4
description_en: CatDoes is a no-code app builder. Its AI agent, Compose, runs in the cloud and has its own computer, so you can close the tab and it keeps working. Compose writes the code, installs the packages, runs the tests, and fixes its own errors. It builds mobile apps and websites. Every plan comes with a backend included, database and auth and storage and edge functions and real-time events. For founders, SMBs, designers, and engineers who want to move faster.
description_zh: CatDoes 是一款无代码应用构建工具。其 AI 智能体 Compose 运行在云端，拥有自己的计算机，即使关闭标签页它也会继续工作。Compose 编写代码、安装依赖包、运行测试、修复自身错误。它可以构建移动应用和网站。每个计划都包含后端服务：数据库、身份验证、存储、边缘函数和实时事件。专为想要快速前行的创始人、中小企业、设计师和工程师打造。

title: Softr AI Co-Builder
description_en: Build custom portals, internal tools, and ops systems with AI in minutes. Describe what you need, and the AI Co-Builder generates the app, database, and business logic, secure and ready for real users. Refine with prompts or edit visually - you're in control.
description_zh: 几分钟内用 AI 构建自定义门户、内部工具和运营系统。描述你的需求，AI Co-Builder 即可生成应用、数据库和业务逻辑，安全可靠，可直接供真实用户使用。用提示词优化或可视化编辑，你全程掌控。

title: Ovren
description_en: Every team has a backlog full of tasks that never make it into a sprint. Ovren puts AI frontend and backend engineers on it - they work inside your real codebase, execute scoped tasks, and deliver reviewable code updates. You stay in control. Nothing ships without your approval.
description_zh: Every team has a backlog full of tasks that never make it into a sprint. Ovren puts AI frontend and backend engineers on it - they work inside your real codebase, execute scoped tasks, and deliver reviewable code updates. You stay in control. Nothing ships without your approval.

title: FuseAI
description_en: Sales was broken. We fixed it. The average team currently uses 5-10 tools to run outbound. Fuse is the AI-native platform where teams can truly run outbound end-to-end with every product you will ever need to close deals. Get access to real-time signals, verified contact data, waterfall enrichment, LinkedIn automation, Email automation, deliverability infrastructure, parallel dialing, and AI-powered workflows - all in one platform designed to replace tool sprawl and simplify pipeline generation.
description_zh: 销售曾经一团糟。我们修复了它。目前，平均每个团队使用5-10个工具来进行外展。Fuse是一个AI原生平台，团队可以在这里真正实现端到端的外展运营，配备达成交易所需的一切产品。获取实时信号、已验证的联系人数据、瀑布式数据丰富、LinkedIn自动化、邮件自动化、送达基础设施、并行拨号以及AI驱动的工作流——全部集于一个平台，旨在取代工具碎片化，简化销售管道生成。

title: Caveman
description_en: Caveman cuts ~75% of Claude's output tokens without losing technical accuracy. One-line install for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, and more. Four grunt levels, terse commits, one-line PR reviews, and input compression built in. 24.9K stars.
description_zh: Caveman可削减约75%的Claude输出token，同时不丢失技术准确性。一行命令安装，支持Claude Code、Cursor、Windsurf、Copilot等。四种代码风格级别、简洁的commit信息、单行PR review，以及内置输入压缩。24.9K星标。

title: Recall 2.0
description_en: AI leveled the playing field. Intelligence has been commoditized. We believe the edge is your knowledge. Recall 1.0 was a place to store that knowledge. Summarized, organized and connected. Recall 2.0 turns that knowledge into your edge. AI grounded in everything you've saved and written. "Condense my research, compare new studies, find the exact clip in my podcast." to “Pick a movie based on what I love” Talk to your knowledge, the internet, or both. You pick the model. API & MCP included.
description_zh: AI抹平了竞技场，智能已成商品。我们相信，真正的优势在于你的知识。Recall 1.0是存储这些知识的地方——摘要、整理、关联。Recall 2.0将这些知识转化为你的竞争优势。AI扎根于你所保存和编写的一切。从“压缩我的研究、对比新研究、找到播客中那个精确片段”到“根据我的喜好选一部电影”，与你的知识、互联网或两者同时对话。由你选择模型。API & MCP 已内置。

title: Ghost Pepper 🌶️
description_en: 100% private on-device voice models for speech-to-text and meeting transcription on macOS. No cloud APIs, no data leaves your machine without your explicit permission.
description_zh: 100%私有本地语音模型，支持macOS语音转文字和会议转录。无需调用云端API，未经您明确许可，数据绝不离开您的设备。

title: Open Agents
description_en: Open Agents is an open-source reference app for building and running background coding agents on Vercel. It includes the web UI, the agent runtime, sandbox orchestration, and the GitHub integration needed to go from prompt to code changes without keeping your laptop involved.
description_zh: Open Agents 是一个开源参考应用，用于在 Vercel 上构建和运行后台编码 Agent。它包含 Web UI、Agent 运行时、沙箱编排以及 GitHub 集成，可以实现从 Prompt 到代码变更的完整流程，无需占用你的笔记本电脑。

title: HeyGen CLI
description_en: Your agent can now generate video, translate content, create avatars, and deliver, straight from the terminal. Every command returns structured JSON and works out of the box in scripts, CI pipelines, and agent workflows.
description_zh: 您的 agent 现在可以直接在终端中生成视频、翻译内容、创建虚拟形象并交付成果。每个命令都返回结构化的 JSON，可开箱即用地用于脚本、CI pipelines 和 agent workflows。

title: ElevenAgents Guardrails 2.0
description_en: Voice agents drift, get manipulated, or go off-brand in production. Guardrails 2.0 adds real-time policy enforcement, prompt injection protection, and custom rules to ElevenAgents. For enterprise teams deploying agents at scale.
description_zh: 语音智能体在生产环境中容易漂移、被操控或偏离品牌调性。Guardrails 2.0 为 ElevenAgents 新增实时策略执行、提示词注入防护和自定义规则。专为大规模部署智能体的企业团队打造。

title: Mutiny
description_en: Move your prospects from cold to closed without waiting on anyone. Create anything customer-facing including ABM campaigns, executive business cases, and deal rooms. Mutiny plugs into your brand and data so everything looks and sounds like you. And you see exactly who engaged.
description_zh: 将潜在客户从冷淡转化为成交，无需等待任何人。创建任何面向客户的内容，包括ABM营销活动、高管商务案例和交易室。Mutiny无缝对接您的品牌和数据，让一切都符合您的品牌调性。您可以精准查看哪些人参与了互动。

title: Google's Nest Doorbell
description_en: Google Nest Doorbell runs on battery: no wiring, no electrician. AI detects people, parcels, animals, and vehicles separately. HD video, night vision, two-way audio, and 3 hours of free event history. Now $129.99 at Best Buy and Walmart.
description_zh: Google Nest 门铃采用电池供电，无需布线，无需电工。AI 智能识别人员、快递包裹、动物和车辆。HD 高清视频、红外夜视、双向语音通话，以及 3 小时免费事件历史记录。现价 $129.99，Best Buy 和 Walmart 有售。

title: Cascode
description_en: Drag-and-drop real AWS services, wire them together, and simulate live traffic. Then inject faults and watch failures cascade through your architecture in real time. Export to CloudFormation or Terraform with auto-inferred IAM in one click. AI Design Doctor grades your architecture and catches anti-patterns. Collaborate in real time with live cursors. Tackle 10 architecture challenges with automated validation. No AWS account needed. Runs entirely in your browser.
description_zh: 拖拽真实的AWS服务组件，将它们连接起来，模拟真实流量。然后注入故障，观察失败如何实时级联传播。通过一键点击即可导出为CloudFormation或Terraform模板，并自动推断IAM权限。AI架构医生会对你的架构进行评分并捕获反模式。使用实时光标进行实时协作。完成10个架构挑战并获得自动化验证。无需AWS账户。完全在浏览器中运行。

title: Strix Agents
description_en: The new Strix platform gives devs continuous security in one place: continuously pentest your apps, block vulnerable PRs before merge, generate merge-ready fixes, and track security posture over time.
description_zh: 全新Strix平台为开发者提供一站式持续安全保护：持续对应用进行渗透测试、合并前阻断有漏洞的Pull Request、生成可直接合并的修复补丁，并持续跟踪安全态势。

title: Shuffle AI Redesign Extension
description_en: Redesign any website with the AI Website Redesign extension - powered by leading AI models. Works seamlessly with local and password-protected sites.
description_zh: 通过AI网站重新设计扩展程序重新设计任何网站 - 由领先的人工智能模型提供支持。支持本地网站和密码保护网站。

title: Creativly
description_en: An AI design exploration studio for creatives to instantly generate high-end visual concepts and brand experiments. Creativly is a community-powered AI visual platform with specialized generators. Pick a generator, fill one field, get studio-quality output in seconds. No prompt engineering. No design skills required. From product mockups to merch, posters to brand assets, fashion to art. And if the generator you need doesn't exist yet? Build it. The community keeps making it richer.
description_zh: 一个AI设计探索工作室，帮助创作者即时生成高端视觉概念和品牌实验。Creativly是一个社区驱动的AI视觉平台，配备专业生成器。选一个生成器，填一个字段，几秒内获得工作室级成果。无需提示词工程，无需设计技能。从产品模型到周边，从海报到品牌资产，从时尚到艺术。如果需要的生成器还不存在？自己构建。社区让平台越来越丰富。

title: Anamap
description_en: Most analytics tools tell you what happened. Anamap tells you why. Cartos is an AI agent that investigates your dashboards, site behavior, and code releases to find the root cause of metric drops in plain English. Not a dashboard, a co-worker.
description_zh: 大多数分析工具只告诉你发生了什么，Anamap告诉你原因。Cartos是一个AI代理，它会调查你的仪表盘、网站行为和代码发布，用通俗易懂的语言找出指标下降的根本原因。不是仪表盘，是同事。

title: Barometric Pressure Offline
description_en: Track sea level pressure and altitude on your phone. Get pressure change alerts, trends, widgets, history, and migraine tracking without an internet connection.
description_zh: 在手机上追踪海平面气压和海拔高度。无需网络连接，即可获取气压变化提醒、趋势分析、小组件、历史记录以及偏头痛追踪功能。

title: Hapax
description_en: Every AI tool waits — waits for you to identify the problem, write the prompt, carry the output back. Hapax doesn't wait. It's the first Proactive AI platform: connect your tools and Hapax watches how you work, spots automation opportunities you didn't know existed, and builds custom AI agents automatically. No prompting. No engineering. You wake up to solutions already running. SOC 2 Type II certified with full audit trails on every AI action. AI that works for you — before you ask.
description_zh: 每款AI工具都在等待——等待您识别问题、编写提示词、将输出结果带回来。Hapax无需等待。它是首个主动式AI平台：连接您的工具后，Hapax会观察您的工作方式，发现您未曾意识到的自动化机会，并自动构建定制化AI智能体。无需编写提示词，无需工程开发。醒来时解决方案已在运行。通过SOC 2 Type II认证，每个AI操作都有完整的审计追踪。在您提出需求之前，AI就已为您工作。

title: SecuSpark
description_en: Studying for CompTIA Security+, A+, Network+, or CySA+ is boring and lonely. SecuSpark turns certification prep into an offline-first RPG — fight pixel-art monsters by answering 2,500+ human-written questions, get AI-powered explanations when stuck, level up your character, join clans, and battle other students in PvP arena. Free tier available.
description_zh: 备考CompTIA Security+、A+、Network+或CySA+既枯燥又孤独。SecuSpark将认证备考变成一款离线优先的RPG——通过回答2500+道人工编写的问题来击败像素风格怪物，遇到困难时获得AI驱动的讲解，提升角色等级，加入公会，并在PVP竞技场与其他学员对战。提供免费版。

title: MarketRecon
description_en: Stop building manual competitor spreadsheets. MarketRecon deploys AI agents to map feature gaps, track pricing changes, and monitor product updates in real-time. Turn weeks of market research into a 25-minute automated workflow.
description_zh: 告别手动整理竞品表格。MarketRecon部署AI代理，绘制功能差距图谱、追踪价格变动、实时监控产品更新。将数周的市场调研工作转化为25分钟的自动化工作流。

title: Renderr
description_en: Most editors are still timeline-first. You drag clips in, cut manually, and spend hours building a first edit. Renderr flips that. Upload your footage and it automatically cuts, structures, captions and adds music in minutes. A 22 minute vlog with 40+ clips can be edited in 10–15 minutes. Then export your timeline to Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro or DaVinci Resolve for full control.
description_zh: 大多数剪辑师仍以时间线为导向。拖入素材、手动剪辑，花费数小时构建初剪。Renderr 颠覆了这一流程。只需上传素材，它即可自动剪辑、结构化处理、添加字幕和配乐，几分钟搞定。一个 22 分钟的 vlog，40+ 个片段，仅需 10–15 分钟即可完成剪辑。随后可导出时间线至 Adobe Premiere Pro、Final Cut Pro 或 DaVinci Resolve，获得完整控制权。

title: FC Tactix
description_en: Use this: FC Tactix is a connected football coaching platform for tactics, board presentations, video exports, drills, sessions, live delivery, player development, and club workflows. Create animated 2D/3D boards, generate plays with AI, build drills and session plans, run training live with timers and attendance, share player explainers by link or QR, collaborate across staff with shared workflows, and reuse tactics, drills, templates, formations, and guides from one connected library.
description_zh: FC Tactix是一款互联足球教练平台，专注于战术设计、战术板演示、视频导出、训练科目、训练课程、实时训练、球员发展和俱乐部工作流程。支持创建动态2D/3D战术板、AI智能生成战术配合、构建训练科目和训练计划、实时训练计时与考勤管理、通过链接或二维码分享球员讲解、团队成员共享工作流程协作，以及从互联资源库中复用战术、训练科目、模板、阵型和指导手册。

title: FlutterAIDev
description_en: Describe your app idea and FlutterAIDev generates clean Flutter code with a real preview. Export APK and source code faster, so you can test, iterate, and ship.
description_zh: 描述你的应用创意，FlutterAIDev 将为你生成干净的 Flutter 代码并提供实时预览。更快导出 APK 和源代码，便于测试、迭代和发布。

title: thefrontkit
description_en: thefrontkit is a growing library of complete business apps — CRMs, invoicing, booking, dashboards, AI tools — that founders clone, rebrand in an afternoon, and launch as real businesses without a dev team.
description_zh: thefrontkit 是一个不断壮大的完整商业应用库——涵盖 CRM、发票管理、预约系统、数据仪表盘、AI 工具——创始人可以克隆这些应用，一个下午就能重新品牌化，无需开发团队就能将其打造为真正的商业项目。

title: Gastos
description_en: Gastos is a private iPhone expense tracker for people who spend at home and while traveling. Type "coffee 4.50", snap a receipt, or say "lunch twenty dollars" — on-device AI parses it. Travel Mode detects timezone changes, switches currencies, and shows home equivalents in real time. Free. No accounts, no cloud.
description_zh: Gastos是一款私密的iPhone支出追踪应用，专为国内和旅行消费设计。输入"咖啡 4.50"、拍摄收据或说"午餐二十美元"——设备端AI自动解析。旅行模式自动识别时区变化、切换货币、实时显示换算为本国货币的金额。完全免费。无需注册账号，不上传云端。

title: HumanInbox
description_en: HumanInbox is your AI email assistant, available directly on Telegram or WhatsApp. It reads your inbox, drafts replies in your tone, sends follow-ups automatically, and keeps your calendar up to date, all without opening your email client. No new app to learn. Just message your assistant like you would a real one, from your phone. Built for solopreneurs and busy executives who get too many emails and have no one to handle them.
description_zh: HumanInbox是您的AI邮件助手，可直接在Telegram或WhatsApp上使用。它读取您的收件箱、以您的语气起草回复、自动发送跟进邮件、并保持日历同步，全程无需打开邮件客户端。无需学习新应用。像与真人交流一样，直接在手机上向助手发消息即可。专为独立创业者和邮件缠身的高管打造，让他们无需专人处理海量邮件。

title: SQL Gnome
description_en: SQL Gnome is a fast, native MySQL client built for macOS. It focuses on the workflows developers actually use: browsing tables, running queries, and exploring data—without the clutter of heavy database tools. Clean interface, safe row limits for large tables, and quick query iteration make it a simple way to work with MySQL. Built by a developer who just wanted a better everyday database tool.
description_zh: SQL Gnome 是一款专为 macOS 打造的快速、原生 MySQL 客户端。它专注于开发者实际使用的工作流：浏览数据表、执行查询、探索数据——无需重型数据库工具的繁琐。简洁界面、大表安全行数限制、快速查询迭代，让 MySQL 操作变得简单。由一位只想拥有更好日常数据库工具的开发者打造。

title: shutup-mcp
description_en: Zero-config MCP proxy that shows agents only the tools they actually need — 98% token reduction, no API keys. - hjs-spec/shutup-mcp
description_zh: 零配置MCP代理，只向代理展示其实际需要的工具——节省98%token，无需API密钥。

title: chrislgarry/Apollo-11
description_en: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.
description_zh: Apollo-11项目保存了阿波罗11号宇宙飞船制导计算机的原始源代码，包含命令模块和登月模块两部分的程序。该项目面向航天历史爱好者、软件工程师和教育工作者，用于研究上世纪60年代航天软件的工程实践。代码主要使用汇编语言编写，体现了当时嵌入式系统编程的典型特征，可作为学习航天软件工程和计算机历史的重要参考资源。

title: shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice
description_en: from vibe coding to agentic engineering - practice makes claude perfect
description_zh: 这是一个专注于 Claude Code 使用最佳实践的开源项目，面向希望提升 AI 辅助编程效率的开发者。项目围绕 Command → Agent → Skill 的架构模式展开，提供涵盖提示词编写、项目规划、CLAUDE.md 配置、Git/PR 操作、调试技巧等 69 个实用技巧，并收录了多位开发者分享的完整工作流程经验，帮助用户从简单的 vibe coding 逐步进阶到系统化的 agentic engineering。

title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
description_en: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.
description_zh: Claude Cookbooks 是一个面向开发者的 Claude 使用指南集，提供分类、检索增强生成、文本摘要、工具集成等多种场景的代码示例和实现方法，帮助开发者快速将 Claude API 集成到自己的项目中，主要使用 Python 编写但概念可适配其他语言。

title: microsoft/markitdown
description_en: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
description_zh: MarkItDown是一个轻量级Python工具，用于将各类文件和办公文档转换为Markdown格式，专注于保留文档结构（标题、列表、表格、链接等），适合为LLM和文本分析管道提供统一的文本输入。该工具支持PowerPoint、图片、音频、CSV、JSON、XML、ZIP文件以及YouTube链接等多种格式的转换，并提供MCP服务器以便与Claude Desktop等LLM应用集成。

title: virattt/ai-hedge-fund
description_en: An AI Hedge Fund Team
description_zh: 这是一个模拟多位传奇投资者决策风格的AI交易系统概念验证项目，通过14个专业Agent协作完成选股和风控，其中既包括巴菲特、芒格等价值投资大师的智能体，也包含估值、情绪、基本面、技术面等量化分析模块。该系统旨在教育场景下探索AI在投资决策中的应用潜力。

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
description_en: The agent that grows with you
description_zh: Hermes Agent是由Nous Research打造的自进化AI agent，具备内置学习循环，能从经验中创建技能并持续自我改进，支持跨会话记忆和用户建模。它兼容OpenRouter、Kimi、小米MiMo、OpenAI等多种模型，通过自然语言配置即可完成日常报告、定时备份等自动化任务。提供完整终端界面，支持多行编辑、命令补全和并行子agent调度，可在本地、云服务器或serverless环境运行，空闲时几乎不产生费用。

title: obra/superpowers
description_en: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
description_zh: Superpowers 是一个面向 AI 编程代理的软件开发框架，通过组合式技能系统引导代理在动手写代码前先理解真实需求、生成可读的规格说明和清晰实现计划，强调红绿 TDD、YAGNI 和 DRY 原则，支持子代理分工协作完成复杂任务，让 Claude 等编程代理能够自主连续工作数小时而不偏离预期方向，适用于使用 Claude Code、Cursor 等 AI 编程工具的开发者提升代码质量和开发效率。

title: jamiepine/voicebox
description_en: The open-source voice synthesis studio
description_zh: Voicebox 是一款开源本地语音合成工作室，提供语音克隆、语音生成和后处理效果等功能，支持 Qwen3-TTS、Chatterbox、LuxTTS 等 5 种 TTS 引擎和 23 种语言，适合需要保护隐私的内容创作者、播客制作者和开发者构建语音应用，所有处理均在本地完成，支持 macOS、Windows、Linux 等多平台部署。

title: pascalorg/editor
description_en: Create and share 3D architectural projects.
description_zh: 这是一个基于React Three Fiber和WebGPU的3D建筑编辑器，支持创建和分享建筑项目，采用Turborepo monorepo架构将场景查看器和交互编辑器分离，使用Zustand管理状态并通过IndexedDB持久化数据与zundo实现撤销/重做功能，节点系统采用扁平字典存储并通过dirty flag机制高效更新几何体，适合建筑师和设计师进行3D建筑建模与协作编辑。

title: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills
description_en: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
description_zh: 这是一个用于改进Claude Code行为的配置文件，基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编程陷阱的观察，提出四个核心原则：编码前先思考（显式声明假设而非默认猜测）、保持简洁（避免过度工程化）、谨慎修改代码（不擅自改动不理解的代码）、管理混淆状态（遇到不明确时主动提问而非猜测执行）。主要面向使用Claude Code进行代码开发的开发者，帮助解决AI编程助手常见的假设错误、过度复杂化、意外修改代码等问题。
